summary: Skills moltbookagent and publish-dist by pepe276 embed Unicode-obfuscated prompt injection and DAN-style jailbreaks targeting agent safety mechanisms.
details: Snyk's ToxicSkills audit found these skills use Unicode contraband injection (invisible/obfuscated characters) combined with DAN-style jailbreak prompts to bypass agent safety constraints. Both remained publicly available on clawhub.ai at the time of Snyk's publication.
